content:
Dear @everyone,

Thank you so much from the bottom of our hearts for your help! We have compiled the translation contributions we've received so far; the translations have been updated in game as of the V2.5.0 update. (06/27/2026)

The list of Volunteers in our in-game Special Thanks page will also be updated according to this list. Please confirm if we have logged your name (the name you want us to credit you by) and contribution content correctly! If there is any mistake, please let me know and we will fix it asap.

**⭐ Translation & Proofreading  ⭐**
JP: ● **Alza (alz_asn / Alza-asn)** 
— Proofreading & Translation 
(Special Ops of Helot: Catena — Story, Stage, Resonance, Relic, etc.; 
Astral Reign — enemy monster skills & states, and more)

TH: ● **darker-kuro **
— Translation 
(Interlude Menus Assignments, corrected various existing translation)

EN: ●** omnichromia **
— Proofreading 
(Arachne kit / Singularity Ultra, Posse 2nd pass, Orisons 2nd pass, various Tooltips, & various effects)

VN: ● **Anicillia** 
— Translation 
(Misc. changes & items)

**⭐ Awakener Pontos — Key Terminology Translation ⭐**
 (A special shoutout to everyone who helped us nail down the key terms for Awakener Pontos across all languages — thank you!)
● ID: **Adelle, Rosemary, Yunita, Orithsuka **
● TH: **darkerkuro, Shiraori, NoEyeBunny **
● JP: **Alza **
● VN: **Anicillia **
● RU: **Haps, Riddle **
● DE: **Strandiel **
● FR: **Basile, Lislium **
● 繁體中文: **金雀釵**

If we've missed anyone or logged anything incorrectly, just let us know and we'll fix it right away. Thank you all again! 💙
guys, If you've previously contributed to Saya & Arachne's terms -- please let me know here so I can add who translated their terms too!!!

AegiX, Adelle, Alza, Anicillia, Arkaether, AsteRIA, Basile, Beenax, Bervernis, Cassius, darkerkuro, Dredge, Elandriah, ghostboots, Goz, Haps, Insigible, Jun, Kainoxis, Larvani, LavenderJuly, Lislium, Loki Locstar, lyaistra, Lykantos, MarcosWG, Miguel Angel, nauravale, Nero, NoEyeBunny, Noah, omnichromia, Orithsuka, Rosemary, Shiraori, Solgazm, SophieChoice, Strandiel, Teje, TheRiddleOfCards, Yunita, 金雀釵
<@733681322081517581> Hi Ace could you please change the name display from “Alza(alz_asn/Alza-asn)” to “Alza”?

RU Arachne: Haps, Riddle

RU Saya: Ansu, Chie, Haps, Riddle

FR Saya: Lislium, Jun
(I didn't work on Arachne's terms so I'm not sure who did them exactly)
